What We Deliberately Do NOT Use
Multi-section pattern (one file = multiple related tasks)
Start server with persistence (mockups saved to project)
Default mode works — the script backgrounds the server itself
Windows auto-detects and uses foreground mode, which blocks the tool call.
Use run_in_background: true on the Bash tool call so the server survives
Codex reaps background processes. The script auto-detects CODEX_CI and
switches to foreground mode. Run it normally — no extra flags needed.
Use --foreground and set is_background: true on your shell tool call
so the process survives across turns

functions.name: _normalize_teaching_plan_heading
functions.docstring: Normalize markdown-heavy headings before parser checks.

functions.name: _parse_units_from_teaching_plan
functions.docstring:
Extrai (titulo_da_unidade, [topicos]) do texto livre do plano de ensino.

Cada topico retorna como `(texto, depth)`:
- depth 0 -> topico principal
- depth 1+ -> subtopicos numerados

functions.name: _topic_text
functions.docstring: Extrai o texto de um topico, seja tupla (text, depth) ou string legada.

functions.name: _topic_depth
functions.docstring: Extrai a profundidade de um topico, seja tupla (text, depth) ou string legada.

functions.name: _parse_bibliography_from_teaching_plan
functions.docstring:
Extrai referências bibliográficas do texto do plano de ensino.
Detecta seção BIBLIOGRAFIA com sub-seções BÁSICA e COMPLEMENTAR.
Retorna {"basica": [str, ...], "complementar": [str, ...]}.

functions.name: _strip_described_image_refs
functions.docstring: Remove image refs whose description is already injected into markdown.

functions.name: remove_entry_consolidated_images
functions.docstring: Remove consolidated content/images assets that belong to one entry.

functions.name: _check_cancel
functions.docstring: Levanta InterruptedError se o build foi cancelado.

methods.name: _check_cancel
methods.docstring: Levanta InterruptedError se o build foi cancelado.

functions.name: incremental_build_impl
functions.docstring: Adiciona novos arquivos a um repositório existente sem recriar do zero.

functions.name: _read_png_dimensions
functions.docstring: Read width and height from a PNG IHDR chunk.

functions.name: _count_unique_colors_png
functions.docstring:
Count unique RGB colors by decompressing PNG IDAT chunks.

Samples up to *sample_limit* pixels to keep it fast.

functions.name: classify_image
functions.docstring:
Classify an image as ``decorativa`` or ``genérico`` using heuristics.

Retorna ``"decorativa"`` para possiveis imagnes que são logos, icones,
plano de fundo, ou qualquer conteudo não visual. Retorna ``"genérico"``
para qualquer coisa que possa conter conteúdo acadêmico significativo.

functions.name: extract_page_number
functions.docstring:
Extract page number from an image filename.

Returns None if no known pattern matches.

functions.name: group_images_by_page
functions.docstring:
Group images in a directory by page number.

Searches two locations:
1. ``images_dir/`` — images whose filename starts with *entry_prefix*
   (standard pymupdf4llm extraction pattern).
2. ``images_dir/scanned/{entry_prefix}/`` — scanned page images
   (one image per page, named ``page-NNN.jpg``).

Images with unrecognized patterns go under key ``None``.

functions.name: render_scanned_pdf_as_images
functions.docstring:
Para PDFs escaneados:
- renderiza cada página como imagem
- cria um markdown base que referencia essas imagens
- usa JPG / JPEG para reduzir peso

functions.name: _strip_kind_marker
functions.docstring: Return text without ``{kind=...}`` markers and the parsed kind if present.

functions.name: extract_date_range_signal
functions.docstring:
Extract a weekly date range from free text.

Returns an empty dict when no range is found.

functions.name: extract_timeline_session_signals
functions.docstring:
Extract session-like temporal cues from free text.

The extractor recognizes:
- inline class dates like ``(30/03/2026): Text``
- plain class dates like ``30/03/2026: Text``
- async markers like ``(atividade assÃ­ncrona): Text``
- linearized HTML text like ``Aula 30/03/2026 Text``

functions.name: _rebuild_tree
functions.docstring: Rebuild tree from current in-memory entries and optionally restore selection.

functions.name: _refresh_entry_after_image_change
functions.docstring: Reload groups for an entry after file-level mutations and refresh tree/UI.

functions.name: _on_tree_select
functions.docstring: Handle tree selection — show images for selected page.

functions.name: _show_images
functions.docstring: Display image cards for the selected page.

functions.name: _extract_page_contexts
functions.docstring:
Extract markdown text per page from the entry's markdown file.

Splits the markdown by page separators (pymupdf4llm inserts ``---`` or
page-break markers) and returns a dict of ``page_key -> text_content``.
This context is passed to the Vision model alongside the image.

functions.name: _toggle_page
functions.docstring: Toggle all images on current page.

functions.name: _preview_full
functions.docstring: Open full-size image preview in a new window.

functions.name: _show_description

functions.name: _render_pdf_page

functions.name: _refresh_pdf_page
functions.docstring: Re-render current PDF page (e.g., after zoom change).

functions.name: _toggle_crop_mode
functions.docstring: Enable or disable crop selection mode on the PDF canvas.

functions.name: _save_cropped_region
functions.docstring: Crop the selected region from the rendered PDF and save as image.

functions.name: _delete_image
functions.docstring: Delete a single image from disk and update tree/manifest state.

functions.name: _delete_images
functions.docstring: Delete one or more images from disk and remove them from curation data.

functions.name: _preclassify

functions.name: _save_curation

functions.name: _describe_single_image

functions.name: _generate_descriptions

methods.name: _show_description
methods.docstring: Show full image description in a scrollable window.

methods.name: _render_pdf_page
methods.docstring: Render a PDF page to the PDF canvas using pymupdf.

methods.name: _refresh_pdf_page
methods.docstring: Re-render current PDF page (e.g., after zoom change).

methods.name: _toggle_crop_mode
methods.docstring: Enable or disable crop selection mode on the PDF canvas.

methods.name: _save_cropped_region
methods.docstring: Crop the selected region from the rendered PDF and save as image.

methods.name: _delete_image
methods.docstring: Delete a single image from disk and update tree/manifest state.

methods.name: _delete_images
methods.docstring: Delete one or more images from disk and remove them from curation data.

methods.name: _preclassify
methods.docstring: Run heuristic pre-classification on all images for the current entry.

methods.name: _save_curation
methods.docstring: Save curation decisions to manifest.json, optionally injecting markdown.

methods.name: _describe_single_image
methods.docstring: Generate (or regenerate) description for a single image.

methods.name: _extract_latex_single
methods.docstring: Extract text + LaTeX content from a scanned page image.

methods.name: _generate_descriptions
methods.docstring: Generate descriptions for included images using the configured vision backend.

methods.name: _write_manifest_entry
methods.docstring: Write the current entry back to manifest.json, stripping internal keys.

functions.name: apply_theme_to_toplevel
functions.docstring:
Aplica a paleta do app a um Toplevel sem acesso direto ao ThemeManager.
Retorna a paleta p para uso imediato no __init__.

Uso padrão em qualquer novo Dialog:
    p = apply_theme_to_toplevel(self, parent)
    self.configure(bg=p["bg"])

classes.name: AppConfig
classes.docstring: Manages persistent app configuration via ~/.gpt_tutor_config.json.

classes.name: ThemeManager
classes.docstring: Applies a colour palette to all ttk/tk widgets via ttk.Style.

functions.name: _load_project_env_file
functions.docstring: Load simple KEY=VALUE pairs from the repository .env without overriding OS env.

functions.name: _resolve_cli_from_project_venv
functions.docstring: Resolve a CLI preferring the repository-local virtualenv over PATH.

functions.name: _configure_tessdata
functions.docstring:
Detecta a instalação do Tesseract e configura TESSDATA_PREFIX se necessário.
Retorna o caminho do tessdata encontrado, ou None.

functions.name: _aspnet_row_kind
functions.docstring: Return (kind, ignored) derived from row background-color. Default: ('class', False).

functions.name: get_app_data_dir
functions.docstring: Retorna o diretório base para configurações do aplicativo.

functions.name: auto_detect_category
functions.docstring: Detecta a categoria provável baseada no nome do arquivo.

functions.name: auto_detect_title
functions.docstring: Gera um título amigável a partir do nome do arquivo.

functions.name: fetch_url_title
functions.docstring:
Busca o <title> de uma URL. Retorna '' em caso de erro.

Funciona com YouTube, sites genéricos, etc.
Usa apenas stdlib (urllib) para evitar dependências extras.

functions.name: _set_building_state
functions.docstring: Muda a UI para o estado de build (botão Cancelar) ou estado normal.

functions.name: _set_processing_state
functions.docstring: Muda a UI para o estado de processamento individual.

functions.name: _start_progress
functions.docstring: Exibe a barra de progresso. total=0 → animação manual (fake indeterminate).

functions.name: _tick_fake_indeterminate
functions.docstring: Avança a barra manualmente para simular animação indeterminate.

functions.name: _save_current_queue
functions.docstring: Persiste a fila atual de arquivos no perfil da matéria ativa.

functions.name: _pdf_page_range
functions.docstring: Retorna '1-N' com o total de páginas do PDF, ou '' em caso de erro.

functions.name: _get_page_count
functions.docstring: Retorna o número de páginas a partir do page_range ou abrindo o PDF.

functions.name: _get_backlog_sources
functions.docstring: Return set of source filenames already in the manifest (backlog).

functions.name: _warn_if_in_backlog
functions.docstring: Filter paths, warning about files already in backlog. Returns paths to add.

functions.name: _on_tree_click
functions.docstring: Toggle enabled quando clica na coluna 'On'.

functions.name: _toggle_selected_enabled
functions.docstring: Toggle enabled/disabled para os itens selecionados (Space ou clique na coluna On).

functions.name: _build_options
functions.docstring: Monta o dict de opções para o RepoBuilder.

functions.name: _repo_dir
functions.docstring:
Retorna o caminho completo do repositório a partir de var_repo_root.

var_repo_root armazena o caminho direto da pasta do repo (sem slug).

functions.name: _select_llm_platform
functions.docstring: Mostra dialog para confirmar/alterar a plataforma principal.

functions.name: _ask_reprocess
functions.docstring: Pergunta ao usuário se quer reprocessar um arquivo já existente.

functions.name: _show_error_detail
functions.docstring: Diálogo de erro com texto selecionável e botão de copiar.

functions.name: _reprocess_repo
functions.docstring: Regenera todos os arquivos pedagógicos do repositório com o código atual.

functions.name: _generate_llm_instructions
functions.docstring: Gera/regenera os arquivos de instruções para as 3 plataformas (Claude, GPT, Gemini).

functions.name: _manifest_path
functions.docstring: Retorna o caminho do manifest.json do repositório ativo, ou None.

functions.name: _parse_review_frontmatter
functions.docstring: Parse YAML-like frontmatter from a review markdown file.

functions.name: _curator_supports_review_path
functions.docstring: Ignore review files that do not belong to the Curator Studio flow.

functions.name: _read_curator_source_text
functions.docstring: Read source text for the editor without loading arbitrarily large files.

functions.name: _preview_page_indices
functions.docstring: Return the subset of PDF pages rendered in Curator Studio previews.

functions.name: _normalize_repo_image_references
functions.docstring:
Rewrite local markdown image refs to stable repo-relative paths.

Curator Studio markdown can move between staging/, manual-review/ and
content/curated/. Relative refs created from the current file location break
after those moves, so repo-local assets are normalized to repo-relative
paths such as ``content/images/...``.

functions.name: _curator_review_paths
functions.docstring: Return only manual-review files handled by Curator Studio.

functions.name: _merge_review_frontmatter_with_manifest
functions.docstring: Overlay missing review-template fields with the current manifest entry.

functions.name: _is_pdf_preview_target
functions.docstring: Return True only for paths that really look like PDFs.

functions.name: _parse_frontmatter
functions.docstring: Parse YAML frontmatter from a review markdown file.

functions.name: _build_source_list
functions.docstring: Build dict of available markdown sources for this review entry.

functions.name: _load_previews
functions.docstring: Render preview from source PDF (via PyMuPDF) or raw images.

functions.name: _repo_relative
functions.docstring: Converte um Path absoluto para caminho relativo ao repositório.

functions.name: _update_manifest_for_approval
functions.docstring:
Atualiza o manifest.json após aprovação no Curator Studio.

Regras:
- grava o markdown final aprovado em approved_markdown e curated_markdown
- limpa ponteiros antigos que foram apagados
- preserva raw_target/source_path
- adiciona log de aprovação

functions.name: _lookup_raw_target
functions.docstring: Look up raw_target from manifest.json for a given entry id.

functions.name: _lookup_manifest_entry
functions.docstring: Look up the current manifest entry for a given review item id.

functions.name: _get_pending_entries
functions.docstring: Retorna entries do manifest que têm markdown mas não foram aprovados.

functions.name: _restore_orphan_entries
functions.docstring:
Regenera templates de manual-review para entries que têm markdown
no staging mas não aparecem no Curator Studio.

functions.name: _approve_all_pending
functions.docstring:
Aprova todos os entries pendentes de uma vez, movendo os markdowns
para o diretório curado correto pela categoria.

functions.name: _reset_current_view
functions.docstring: Limpa a seleção atual da UI após aprovar/reprovar.

functions.name: _reject_current
functions.docstring:
Reprova o item atual:
- remove os arquivos gerados
- remove o PDF/raw do repo
- tira a entry do manifest
- devolve o FileEntry para a fila principal

functions.name: _clean_thinking_artifacts
functions.docstring:
Remove Qwen3-VL thinking/reasoning artifacts from response text.

When the model ignores think=False and /no_think, its internal reasoning
(in English) leaks into the output. This function extracts only the final
Portuguese description, discarding the reasoning chain.

functions.name: get_vision_setup_status
functions.docstring: Collect Ollama vision setup details for UI diagnostics.

functions.name: _encode_image
functions.docstring: Read and base64-encode an image from disk for Ollama chat payloads.

functions.name: check_availability
functions.docstring:
Check if Ollama is running and a vision model is available.
Tries DEFAULT_MODEL first, falls back to FALLBACK_MODEL.
Returns (available, message).

functions.name: _send_vision_request
functions.docstring:
Send a prompt + image to the Vision model via /api/chat.

Returns the cleaned response text.

functions.name: describe_image
functions.docstring:
Send an image to the Vision model and return the text description.

Args:
    image_path: Path to the image file.
    image_type: One of the IMAGE_TYPE_PROMPTS keys.
    page_context: Markdown text from the same page as the image.

functions.name: extract_to_latex
functions.docstring:
Extract text + math content from a scanned page image as LaTeX/Markdown.

Args:
    image_path: Path to the scanned page image.
    page_context: Optional context from adjacent pages.

functions.name: prevent_system_sleep
functions.docstring: Prevent Windows from suspending the system while a long task is running.

functions.name: get_vision_client
functions.docstring:
Create the configured vision client.

The current architecture is Ollama-only. ``vision_backend`` is kept in the
config for backward compatibility with older saved settings.

functions.name: _parse_syllabus_timeline
functions.docstring:
Parseia o cronograma (Markdown table) e retorna lista de dicts.

Cada dict tem chaves normalizadas das colunas do cronograma.
Exemplo de retorno:
    [
        {"semana": "1", "data": "2026-03-02", "conteúdo": "Unidade 1: Métodos Formais"},
        {"semana": "2", "data": "2026-03-09", "conteúdo": "Continuação Unidade 1"},
        ...
    ]

Suporta tabelas Markdown com qualquer nome de coluna — normaliza para minúsculas.

functions.name: run_cli_with_timeout
